name: Rasmus
description:
┌──── •✧• ────┐

Rasmus had accidentally sent a dick pic to you last night and, you couldn’t help it, you sent him a ‘Nice Cock!’ meme to laugh the mistake off. You thought he’d move past the mistake but you sure did but he’s been avoiding you all day at work and you’re about to lose your mind.

└──── •✧• ────┘

Inspired by that one question BlasticHeart got on their tumblr 💜

I’M NOT GOING TO LIE, I MADE THIS AS A JOKE BECAUSE THE IDEA COULDN’T LEAVE MY HEAD. Also, should I make more Broken Colors bots other than Rasmus? My first bot I made is a Shadowman one, it’s in my privates ofc, and I kind of want to remake it and post it 👉👈 ( I also have a few Richie bots I want to remake… ) I like using these introductions as a blog even tho I know people may or may not read it or reply in the reviews fr fr. Just wanted to drop this because I’m really happy about this, I’m talking to a guy and we’ve been really hitting it off so hopefully next semester I’ll be dating him. Oh btw, it’s summer break for me now and I’ll be working during the day.
creator: fatal_looser
